issues.title: Transition to GovEngine roadmap execution
issues.body:
Task: H052-S001 — Transition to GovEngine roadmap execution

Roadmap context:
Signposter H052 cross-repo handoff side-task: after the H052 final audit/bootstrap task, move operational focus to the existing GovEngine roadmap and begin its Signposter-managed lifecycle.

Worker objective:
Use Signposter to hand off from the current Signposter H052 roadmap to the existing GovEngine roadmap and start the GovEngine lifecycle loop from the first eligible task, but only after H052 final audit/bootstrap is complete. Verify the target repository, issue DAG state, branch/worktree safety, and dry-run lifecycle plan before any execution.

Deliverables:
- Wait for the H052 final audit/bootstrap issue to be complete before selecting this side-task.
- Verify the target repo is ExatronOmega/GovEngine and that the GovEngine roadmap issues are present.
- Identify the first eligible GovEngine task through Signposter planner/scheduler/lifecycle status, not by guessing.
- Produce the dry-run lifecycle/worktree/run plan for the selected GovEngine issue.
- If all guards are ready, begin the GovEngine Signposter lifecycle from that issue using the normal dry-run then apply/execute sequence.
- Record concise handoff evidence in the side-task report.

Expected changed areas:
- No Signposter code changes are expected.
- Local/operator artifacts only unless the GovEngine lifecycle task itself later requires repo changes.

Non-goals:
- Do not edit Signposter production code in this transition task.
- Do not create or rewrite the GovEngine roadmap.
- Do not bypass H052 final audit/bootstrap.
- Do not bypass GovEngine issue dependencies.
- Do not mutate GitHub outside guarded Signposter --apply paths.
- Do not execute backend work before dry-run lifecycle/worktree/run plans are ready.

Dependencies:
* none

Dependency metadata:
* none

Acceptance criteria:
* H052-S001: H052 final audit/bootstrap issue is complete before GovEngine lifecycle starts.
* H052-S001: GovEngine target repo and roadmap state are verified.
* H052-S001: first eligible GovEngine task is selected through Signposter status or scheduler evidence.
* H052-S001: dry-run lifecycle/worktree/run commands are recorded before execution.
* H052-S001: no Signposter production code changes are made.
* H052-S001: no GitHub mutation occurs outside guarded Signposter --apply paths.
* ruff check . passes.
* python -m pytest tests/ -q passes.

Validation:
- `signposter lifecycle status --repo ExatronOmega/signposter --issue 744`.
- `signposter planner status` or scheduler equivalent for the GovEngine roadmap.
- `signposter lifecycle status --repo ExatronOmega/GovEngine --issue <selected>`.
- `signposter worktree plan --repo ExatronOmega/GovEngine --issue <selected>`.
- `signposter run --repo ExatronOmega/GovEngine --issue <selected> --dry-run`.

Implementation notes:
- This is a cross-repo operational handoff side-task, not a Signposter feature task.
- Prefer an existing GovEngine manifest if available; otherwise use current GitHub issue graph and dependency metadata.
- Protected base branches are read-only bases. Worker mutation must happen on an isolated task branch/worktree.
